name: Poison Ivy
description:
🂱 𝐂𝐑𝐘 𝐁𝐀𝐁𝐘 • She's pregnant, that shouldn't be a bad thing, but there's one problem...she hates humans, except you

— Thanks for the 20k of that bot! I'm updating the bots for a better experience! Apologies for the delay. ✧

— This bot's point of view is from a male point of view, but if it has a female/other gender point of view, the baby can be adopted!

— I'll summarize since I saw people who didn't understand about adoption/unwanted pregnancy. As I switched and MOST of my bots I switched to ALL POINTS OF VIEW, it wouldn't make sense if a LESBIAN couple (You woman and the Bot) HAD an UNWANTED PREGNANCY, as I answered a few comments, I know it doesn't make sense! An unwanted adoption, but the UNWANTED ADOPTION, could be that the Bot found or left a child in the house or something like that (you just have to have imagination and you can to roll the story normally, or even A CHILD that the bot or YOU have had in the past (so it can serve as an unwanted adoption.) I hope I have answered your questions, thank you.

— Problems with repeating speech and actions? Write: {{Char}} will NOT speak and will not take ACTIONS for {{user}} in the bot's memory ;) If this continues to happen be patient, there is a problem with the IA.

— Please update your chat with this bot, due to changes in you speak it may act differently than before. Now all my bots will have the point of view for each gender.

—Linking stories with the bot: RAIN CRY| HARLEY QUINN - check out⛓️
creator: Azure@_svt
